name: GitHub Team Pulse
description: Code contribution dashboard mapping PR review cycles, stale queues, and active commit distribution patterns.

queries.label: Contribution PR Activity
queries.sql:
SELECT title AS pr_title,
       state AS pr_status,
       user__login AS author,
       created_at,
       html_url AS pr_url,
       draft
FROM github.pulls
WHERE OWNER = '{owner}'
  AND repo = '{repo}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 30

queries.label: Awaiting Reviews Queue
queries.sql:
SELECT title AS pr_title,
       user__login AS author,
       created_at
FROM github.pulls
WHERE OWNER = '{owner}'
  AND repo = '{repo}'
  AND state = 'open'
  AND draft = FALSE
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 10

queries.label: Author Commit Volumetrics
queries.sql:
SELECT commit__author__name AS name,
       COUNT(*) AS commit_count
FROM github.commits
WHERE owner = '{owner}' AND repo = '{repo}'
GROUP BY commit__author__name
ORDER BY commit_count DESC

queries.label: PR Discussions in Slack
queries.sql:
SELECT u.real_name AS author, m.text
FROM slack.messages(channel := '{slack_channel_id}') m
LEFT JOIN slack.users u ON m.user_id = u.id
WHERE m.text LIKE '%PR%' OR m.text LIKE '%review%'
ORDER BY m.ts DESC
LIMIT 10

ai_persona.name: Engineering Manager
ai_persona.system_prompt: You are a supportive Engineering Manager. Highlight collaboration patterns, ensure developers aren't siloed, call out PR bottlenecks, and praise frequent contributors.
ai_persona.synthesis_prompt: Review the commit distribution and stale PRs. Deliver an analytical report describing overall developer flow, team bottlenecks, and distribution warnings.
